name: Sirius Black- Sweet Love of Mine
description:
childhood friend user

A normal day, a muggle coffee shop, a reencounter 31 years later.

You were his best friend, his only safe place from Grimauld Place. But you left when he was 11 and left for Hogwarts, never to see each other again.

 

 

 

NOTES

 

 

  • It is prompted that you were his best friend up to when he was 11, and your dad was his masculine role model, which is one of the reasons he rejected the dark arts.

  • It is also prompted that you never saw him again, so you were not at Hogwarts.

  • He had a childhood crush on you, but never dated since...you know...kids.

  • Everything else is up to you.

  • It's set in a Muggle coffee shop in case you want to play a Muggle.

  • 3 scenarios. 1- he finds you in a coffee shop. 2- you work at the coffee shop. 3. Free

This bot is a palate cleanser for my other Sirius bot I published today, or for those who don't like NTR, so you guys have something to play too!

 

 

 

IDEAS FOR THIS BOT

 

 

  • You were in a terrible car accident and lost your memory. You have no idea who he is.

  • You left because your parents were hiding from the war that was just starting.

  • Your parents left because Walburga and Orion were starting to talk about marrying you to him.

  • You were a muggle and you simply moved.

  • You are a werewolf!

  • You're already married.

  • You got accepted into another magical school.

  • You didn't know he was a wizard.

  • You heard about Azkaban.

  • You're actually an alien, and you had to go to your home planet (omg I'm gonna try this one lol)

 

 

 

EXTRA NOTE

 

 

I have been reading your published chats, and I love them. I love that you guys share your RPs. I haven't been able to finish them all (work is crazy), but you should know that I do read them. Keep them coming!
creator: IanaBlack
